onboarding.pageSubtitle: Choose who you are and what matters. Life Buddy will build the first version for you.
onboarding.title: Build your Life KPI system by identifying yourself, not by creating KPIs manually.
onboarding.subtitle: Choose your language, country, roles, relationships, assets, interests, and priorities. Life Buddy will turn those selections into categories, KPIs, activities, and relationship trackers.
onboarding.summaryCardText1: Categories, KPIs, activities, and relationship trackers built from your selections.
onboarding.summaryCardTextEmpty: Make a few quick selections and Life Buddy will do the rest.
onboarding.summaryCardHint: The goal is to finish in under three minutes and avoid manual KPI setup.
onboarding.reviewText: Life Buddy generated this from your language, roles, relationships, assets, interests, and priorities.
onboarding.reviewEditText: Adjust categories, KPIs, activities, and relationship trackers before saving.

alerts.saveFailedMessage: Please try again. Your generated setup is still here.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language you want to use in Life KPI.
language.helperText: We detected a device language for you, and you can change it any time.

country.title: Country
country.subtitle: Choose the country you want Life KPI to format for.
country.helperText: This sets your default locale, currency, and timezone foundation.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Which roles describe your current life?
roles.helperText: Choose the roles that should shape your starter system.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.subtitle: Which relationships deserve built-in follow-through?
relationships.helperText: These can generate relationship trackers and supporting categories.

assets.title: Assets
assets.subtitle: What do you own or manage that needs recurring care?
assets.helperText: Assets unlock maintenance and readiness routines.

interests.title: Interests
interests.subtitle: What areas do you naturally care about improving?
interests.helperText: These help personalize the system beyond basic responsibilities.

priorities.title: Priorities
priorities.subtitle: Where do you want support from day one?
priorities.helperText: These push the most important life areas into your starter setup.

employee.label: Employee
employee.description: Stay effective at work and manage your workload well.

manager.label: Manager
manager.description: Lead people, follow through on meetings, and keep responsibilities visible.

business_owner.label: Business Owner
business_owner.description: Lead work, growth, and responsibility with intention.

founder.label: Founder
founder.description: Balance building, decision making, and long-horizon execution.

freelancer.label: Freelancer
freelancer.description: Manage client work, pipeline, and self-direction.

consultant.label: Consultant
consultant.description: Track delivery, client relationships, and follow-through.

creator.label: Creator
creator.description: Support publishing rhythm, content systems, and creative momentum.

sales_professional.label: Sales Professional
sales_professional.description: Stay consistent with outreach, pipeline, and relationship follow-up.

software_professional.label: Software Professional
software_professional.description: Protect deep work, learning, and delivery habits.

finance_professional.label: Finance Professional
finance_professional.description: Support precision, review cycles, and structured execution.

auditor.label: Auditor
auditor.description: Keep review, documentation, and follow-up clean and timely.

lawyer.description: Support casework, deadlines, and documentation follow-through.

doctor.label: Doctor
doctor.description: Balance demanding work, health, and personal accountability.

teacher.label: Teacher
teacher.description: Support planning, teaching energy, and meaningful routines.

government_employee.label: Government Employee
government_employee.description: Stay on top of structured work, duties, and long-term responsibilities.

student.label: Student
student.description: Balance classes, study, and long-term learning.

college_student.label: College Student
college_student.description: Handle academics, relationships, and independent routines.

exam_aspirant.label: Exam Aspirant
exam_aspirant.description: Create structure for revision, practice, and consistency.

researcher.label: Researcher
researcher.description: Support deep focus, learning systems, and long-form work.

intern.label: Intern
intern.description: Build early-career habits, learning, and follow-through.

early_career.label: Early Career
early_career.description: Build identity, momentum, and reliable foundational habits.

mid_career.label: Mid Career
mid_career.description: Balance performance, growth, and wider life responsibilities.

senior_professional.label: Senior Professional
senior_professional.description: Support leadership, energy management, and long-horizon priorities.

retired.label: Retired

homemaker.description: Support home, family, and personal systems with less mental overhead.

gym_member.label: Gym Member
gym_member.description: You want exercise and fitness to be part of the system.

runner.label: Runner
runner.description: Support training rhythm, recovery, and performance consistency.

cyclist.label: Cyclist
cyclist.description: Track rides, recovery, and equipment care.

sportsperson.label: Sportsperson
sportsperson.description: Build reliable practice, performance, and recovery loops.

yoga_practitioner.label: Yoga Practitioner
yoga_practitioner.description: Support mindful movement, recovery, and calm routines.

investor.label: Investor
investor.description: You want a real investing rhythm, not good intentions.

trader.label: Trader
trader.description: Support review, risk discipline, and consistent market habits.

home_owner.label: Home Owner
home_owner.description: Your home needs recurring care and maintenance.

tenant.label: Tenant
tenant.description: Track household maintenance, documents, and rental responsibilities.

car_owner.label: Car Owner
car_owner.description: Track car upkeep and preventive maintenance.

motorcycle_owner.label: Motorcycle Owner
motorcycle_owner.description: Track bike cleaning, chain care, and service.

parent.label: Parent
parent.description: Build steadier support for family, coordination, and attention.

caregiver.label: Caregiver
caregiver.description: Support recurring care, check-ins, and life admin for others.

pet_owner.label: Pet Owner
pet_owner.description: Build routines for care, movement, and health.

community_volunteer.description: Support service, participation, and community follow-through.

married.label: Married / Partnered
married.description: Protect the rhythm of your closest relationship.

parents_alive.label: Parents Alive
parents_alive.description: Stay meaningfully connected with your parents.

children.label: Children
children.description: Build in quality family time and support.

close_friends.label: Close Friends
close_friends.description: Keep friendships active instead of accidental.

dog_owner.label: Dog Owner
dog_owner.description: Build routines for care, movement, and health.

learning.label: Learning
learning.description: Reading, study, and skill growth matter to you.

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: You want cleaner execution and planning systems.

mental_wellness.label: Mental Wellness
mental_wellness.description: Calm, reflection, and mental hygiene deserve support.

travel_enthusiast.label: Travel
travel_enthusiast.description: Trips and travel readiness are part of your life.

spirituality.label: Spirituality
spirituality.description: You want space for spiritual or reflective practice.

finance_focus.label: Finance
finance_focus.description: Prioritize money clarity and financial momentum.

recommendations.title: Life Buddy Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Life Buddy picked the most useful activities first so onboarding stays fast. Selected items become active activities. Unselected items stay in the library for later.
recommendations.recommendedSubtitle: Highest-priority actions based on your selected triggers.
recommendations.optionalSubtitle: Useful extras you can activate now or leave for later.
recommendations.optionalEmpty: No optional activities for this setup.

preview.generatedSetupSubtitle: Review everything before saving. You can edit categories, KPIs, activities, relationships, and reminder defaults.
preview.generatedStructureSubtitle: This becomes your main tracking structure.
preview.relationshipTrackersSubtitle: These become people records and follow-up to-dos.
preview.reminderPreferencesSubtitle: Pick the defaults you want saved with this setup.
preview.noCategoriesMessage: Add a category to start building your setup.
preview.noKpis: No KPIs yet. Add one to make this category actionable.
preview.noActivities: No activities yet. Add one to turn this KPI into a trackable routine.
preview.noRelationships: No relationship trackers yet. Add one if staying connected matters to your setup.
